subcodes.first_line: We have commanded all to wisdom, and have forbidden that which causeth souls to be perturbed. Therefore it is incumbent upon all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع را امر بحکمت نمودیم و از ما تضطرب به النفوس نهی فرمودیم لذا بر کل لازم
subcodes.subjects: @pioneering; travel teaching, @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @contention and conflict
